content: Remote OK Digital Marketing Manager Hunt St <p>ГўВҖВӢГўВҖВӢLooking for Filipino (Philippines-based) candidates</p><p>Job Role: Digital Marketing Manager</p><p>Compensation range: $2,500 - $3,000 AUD/month</p><p>Engagement type: Independent Contractor</p><p>Work Schedule: This role is expected to align with the AU business hours (approx. 9.00 AM - 5 PM, Monday to Friday) for collaboration, but as a contractor, youГўВҖВҷll have flexibility in how you manage your time.</p><p></p><p>Who We Are: At Hunt St, we help Australian companies directly hire top 5% remote talent in the Philippines. You will be hired directly by the client, typically as an independent contractor. We are not an outsourcing agency. All of our roles are 100% remote, so you'll be able to work from home.</p><p>Who The Client Is:</p><p>Our client is a well-established law firm based in Tasmania with over 100 staff. They provide a wide range of legal services across areas such as property, conveyancing, and general legal matters. The firm is known for its professional and collaborative environment, with a structured team of admin staff and paralegals supporting lawyers to ensure smooth operations.</p><p>About the Role</p><p>WeГўВҖВҷre looking for a digitally-savvy marketing professional to own our online presence, from SEO and Google Ads to social media and content. This is a hands-on role for someone who understands digital marketing deeply and can work autonomously to drive measurable results.</p><p>Key Responsibilities:</p><p>Search Engine Optimisation (SEO) ГўВҖВ” Core Focus</p><ul><li>SEO is the primary focus of this role. YouГўВҖВҷll own the firmГўВҖВҷs search strategy end-to-end:<br /> ГўВҖВў Develop and execute the firmГўВҖВҷs SEO strategy to grow organic search visibility<br /> ГўВҖВў Conduct keyword research and implement on-page optimisation across the website<br /> ГўВҖВў Manage technical SEO foundations (site structure, metadata, page speed, schema)<br /> ГўВҖВў Build and manage a link-building pipeline (guest posts, citations, partnerships)<br /> ГўВҖВў Use tools like Ahrefs or SEMrush to track rankings, traffic, and opportunities<br /> ГўВҖВў Provide regular SEO performance reports with clear recommendations</li><li>Paid Advertising &amp; Social Media<br /> ГўВҖВў Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns, including budget and performance tracking<br /> ГўВҖВў Maintain and grow the firmГўВҖВҷs presence on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram<br /> ГўВҖВў Plan, schedule, and publish content across channels in line with brand tone</li><li>Content &amp; Website<br /> ГўВҖВў Collaborate with internal staff to develop articles, updates, and campaign content<br /> ГўВҖВў Coordinate publishing of website and blog content<br /> ГўВҖВў Keep the website current and aligned with firm branding</li><li>Reporting &amp; Analytics<br /> ГўВҖВў Track and report on performance across SEO, Google Ads, and social channels<br /> ГўВҖВў Translate data into clear insights and actionable recommendations<br /> ГўВҖВў Assist with marketing planning and budget tracking as required</li><li>External Partnerships &amp; General Support<br /> ГўВҖВў Liaise with external marketing providers and agencies<br /> ГўВҖВў Coordinate campaigns and ensure deliverables are met on time<br /> ГўВҖВў Assist with broader initiatives including sponsorships and promotions<br /> ГўВҖВў Assist with general Admin tasks where needed</li></ul>Required Skills and Qualifications:<ul><li>3+ years in digital marketing with a strong SEO focus</li><li>Experience in Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar SEO tools</li><li>ГӮ Hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns</li><li>Social media management across LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram</li><li>Comfortable with basic graphic design (Canva or similar)</li><li>Strong written English and communication skills</li><li>Highly organised, self-directed, and outcomes-focused</li></ul><p></p><p>Work Arrangement &amp; Expectations:</p><p>This is a remote role that will be set up as an independent contractor engagement.</p><p>To ensure alignment and transparency, successful candidates will be expected to:</p><ul><li>Disclose any existing ongoing roles or client work</li><li>Reflect this engagement on their LinkedIn profile (clearly marked as ГўВҖВңIndependent ContractorГўВҖВқ)</li></ul> exec, design, technical 2026-06-22T14:00:02+00:00 1133850 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-digital-marketing-manager-hunt-st-1133850 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Human Resources Assistant Recruit Lytics Hires <p>We are a growing organization committed to fostering a professional, inclusive, and employee-focused workplace. Our Human Resources team plays a critical role in supporting our workforce and ensuring that employees receive the resources, guidance, and support needed to succeed. We are currently seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented <strong>Human Resources Assistant</strong> to join our team and contribute to the smooth operation of our HR department.</p> <p>The Human Resources Assistant will provide comprehensive administrative and operational support across various HR functions, including recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, record management, compliance, and internal communications. This role is ideal for an individual who enjoys working with people, has strong organizational skills, and is passionate about supporting employee success while maintaining accurate and confidential HR records.</p> <p>As a key member of the HR team, you will assist with day-to-day human resources activities and help ensure that HR processes are carried out efficiently and in accordance with company policies and employment regulations.</p> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>Recruitment &amp; Hiring Support</strong></p> <ul><li>Assist with the recruitment process by posting job advertisements, screening applications, and coordinating interviews.</li><li>Schedule interviews and communicate with candidates throughout the hiring process.</li><li>Prepare offer letters, employment contracts, and onboarding documentation.</li><li>Maintain recruitment records and applicant tracking systems.</li><br></ul> <p><strong>Employee Onboarding &amp; Administration</strong></p> <ul><li>Coordinate new employee onboarding and orientation activities.</li><li>Prepare employee files and ensure all required documentation is completed and maintained.</li><li>Assist employees with HR-related inquiries and requests.</li><li>Maintain accurate employee records, databases, and filing systems.</li><br></ul> <p><strong>HR Operations &amp; Compliance</strong></p> <ul><li>Ensure employee records remain current, accurate, and compliant with company policies and legal requirements.</li><li>Assist in monitoring HR procedures and compliance standards.</li><li>Support the preparation of HR reports, metrics, and documentation.</li><li>Help administer employee policies, handbooks, and workplace procedures.</li><br></ul> <p><strong>Employee Engagement &amp; Support</strong></p> <ul><li>Support employee engagement initiatives, trainin
